task_completion.description: Verify that a WPF Application named 'SensorDashboard' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Solution Explorer in Visual Studio shows a solution and project named 'SensorDashboard'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Models\SensorReading.cs' class with the required properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing 'SensorReading.cs' inside a 'Models' folder, containing properties for SensorName (string), Value (double), Unit (string), and Timestamp (DateTime).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'ViewModels\DashboardViewModel.cs' with an ObservableCollection of at least five sample entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing 'DashboardViewModel.cs' inside a 'ViewModels' folder, containing an ObservableCollection<SensorReading> named 'Readings' and code initializing it with at least 5 sample SensorReading objects.

task_completion.description: Verify that MainWindow.xaml contains a ListView or ListBox bound to the 'Readings' collection and the Window Title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: XAML editor showing `<Window Title="Sensor Dashboard"...>` and a `<ListView>` or `<ListBox>` with `ItemsSource="{Binding Readings}"`.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DataContext of MainWindow is set to the DashboardViewModel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: XAML editor showing `<Window.DataContext>` containing the DashboardViewModel, OR the MainWindow.xaml.cs code-behind showing `DataContext = new DashboardViewModel();`.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final solution builds successfully with zero errors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual Studio Output window showing 'Build: 1 succeeded' or the Error List window showing 0 errors after a build action.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Visual Studio 2022 GUI to create and edit the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Visual Studio 2022 IDE interface (Solution Explorer, code editor tabs, menus) rather than just terminal commands like 'dotnet new wpf'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual IDE features for coding.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of syntax highlighting, IntelliSense popups, or standard Visual Studio window layouts during code editing.

integrity.description: Verify the build success is authentic and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output is visible in the standard Visual Studio Output or Error List panels, showing actual compiler output paths matching 'SensorDashboard'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target solution file is located at C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\SensorDashboard\SensorDashboard.sln and the project file at C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\SensorDashboard\SensorDashboard.csproj. Ensure the project structure reflects these paths.
